description: Angle-beam V-path on plate of thickness T: probe on refracting wedge at left (index point marked), dashed surface normal + theta arc measured from the vertical, true-60-degree shear V (leg 1 to backwall bounce, leg 2 up into the single-V weld cap at right), ghost half-skip ray landing on the root, stacked half-skip / full-skip dimensions, formula chip, T bracket, grease-pencil scan-zone band. No numeric values in art - lesson note overlays supply numbers.
